name: Power meter
description: Electrical power/energy meters and smart plugs reporting cumulative energy and/or instantaneous voltage, current, and active power.
notes: metering.energy.total is Wh (multiply kWh x1000); power.voltage V, power.current A, power.active W, power.frequency Hz, power.factor -1..1. Relay/load on-off state is a camelCase extra.
